chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 662 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3750/2022. 2. For orders on office objection No.1. 3. For orders on CMA No.3751/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.3752/2023. 29.10.2025 Matter is pending since 2022 without any progress. On the last date adjournment was sought on behalf of applicant’s counsel and a fixed date was given. Today being the said date, however, applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
